Whether you need to search for users by department, dynamically pull manager details for approval workflows, or customize notifications with user-specific data, this connector simplifies access to Office 365 user information.

Title: Configure BOM costing and reporting in Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management
Description: Configuring BOM costing and reporting in Dynamics 365 SCM streamlines cost management by providing accurate tracking of component and production costs, ensuring precise pricing and financial planning. It simplifies inventory management, reduces material waste, and enables efficient production with fewer BOM versions. Automated reporting and validation checks enhance error prevention and decision-making, while improved cost control supports better financial oversight and scalability.

Title: Organize your inbox in new Outlook for Windows
Description: Unlock the full potential of your inbox with the new Outlook. Learn how to organize your emails, making it easier to find important messages and stay on top of your communications. Learn how to use features like Focused Inbox, pinning messages, and creating categories to streamline your workflow. Additionally, discover advanced search techniques to quickly locate specific emails and conversations. By the end of this module, you are equipped with the tools and knowledge to manage your inbox like a pro.
